message:
style(fp-conformance): rustfmt SeriesToFrame match arm

Converts the inline Err(...) return in the catch-all arm of
execute_and_compare_differential's SeriesToFrame branch into a braced
block. Pure formatting change picked up by rustfmt - same control
flow, same error string, same diagnostics. Keeps the conformance
crate cargo fmt clean so the rest of the workspace style gates keep
passing without noise.
